name: Mini-Pumpkin Pies
recipeInstructions:
(I mix my own using cinnamon, allspice & nutmeg)
Combine all ingredients in a large bowl until smooth and well mixed.
Line a mini muffin tin with paper liners or spray the cups with Pam cooking spray.
Pour batter into each cup, filling them about 3/4 full.
Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 30 minutes until set.
